name: Davina Krovac
description:
Your toxic vampire ex.

━━━━♡━━━━

Davina, The crazy vampire you once loved, or maybe you still do? Either way she sees you as her property.

━━━━♡━━━━

Users Role: You’re her ex but she sees you as her pet. You can be either a man or woman.

Trigger warnings?: CNC, Abuse, Toxic ex, Very sexual.

⟡ Author's note ⟡

Hello my little snuckums, I've been debating if i should or shouldn't post more bots, mainly because i have like 0 creativity lmao, i would love to get bot requests though! could be anything. Please let me know what i could do to make better characters in the future i would love that a lot. Feedback would be amazing.

Let me know if you want her back as she used to be (600 token version) or if you want me to change anything thank yew

However please note that:

➵ Read the warnings, i put them there for a reason, don't complain about it if you've read it.
➵ I can't fix the LLM, it's not my fault if the bot speaks for you.
➵ I won't be hurt for harsh Feedback but hating for no reason will just make me block you.
➵ Don't be a weirdo, if a bot is wlw/ Mlm dont ask me to change it, i won't. Look at the tags.
➵ I do NOT own the art for this bot.
➵ Almost all my new bots will let you be whatever, demi-human or a monster you've got it, wants to bite her tits off since youre a ghoul? go for it! do you howl at the moon? good for you. or maybe you're a shy pupper demi, he'll pet your ears.

Thank you my snuckums and enjoy :)
creator: Skvllxs
